alkylation reagent: the reduced disulfide bonds were alkylated by adding 5.0 μL of 15.0 mg/mL iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Trypsin (Promega) was reconstituted in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
instrument: analyzed on a Thermo Scientific Q Exactive Plus high-resolution, accurate-mass (HRAM) mass spectrometer
ionization type: The LC eluent was ionized using a nanospray (NSI) source in positive ion mode.
reduction reagent: 5.0 μL of 5.0 mg/mL dithiothreitol (DTT) in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
